build.buildCommand: npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --skip-generate && (echo '==> rodando seed (admin + lojas):' && npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts || echo '==> seed falhou, seguindo sem seed') && echo '==> iniciando Nest:' && node dist/main
